title: Professor X/Earth-838
content:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Professor X {{!}} Earth-838}} {{CharHub|Professor X|Charles Xavier}} {{AltUniverse|[[Earth-838]]|3=Characters}} {{Character |name = Professor X |image = Professor X - Earth-838 Infobox.jpg |real name = Charles {{Conjecture|Francis}} Xavier{{Ref|DSitMoM}}{{Ref|Conjec}} |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Professor X{{Ref|MSTMCUAOT}}}} |species = [[Mutant]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |DOD = [[2024/Earth-838|November 22, 2024]]{{Ref|DSitMoM}}{{Ref|MSTMCUAOT}} |title = Professor
Doctor |affiliation = {{Affiliation|ILL}} |movie = ''[[Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness]]'' |actor = [[Patrick Stewart]] |status = Deceased}} {{Quote|Just because someone stumbles and loses their way doesn’t mean they are lost forever.|Professor X to [[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} Professor '''Charles {{Conjecture|Francis}} Xavier''' was a [[mutant]] with telepathic powers who served as a member of the [[Illuminati]] as '''Professor X'''. During the [[Infinity War/Earth-838|Infinity War]], he joined the other members of the Illuminati in killing [[Thanos/Earth-838|Thanos]] on [[Titan]] before they [[Execution of Doctor Strange|executed]] [[Supreme Strange|Doctor Strange]]. In [[2024/Earth-838|2024]], Professor X attended an Illuminati meeting when another [[Doctor Strange]], who had traveled to their universe, was brought before them. When [[Scarlet Witch]] attacked the [[Illuminati Headquarters]], he gave Strange some parting advice before confronting Scarlet Witch. Professor X attempted to defeat her telepathically, but Scarlet Witch tore his head off, killing him in the real world by a snapped neck. ==Biography== {{MD|Charles Xavier (Earth-838)}} ===Illuminati Member=== ====Joining the Illuminati==== Charles Xavier was a [[mutant]] telepath known as Professor X, whose status and power soon made him be approached by [[Supreme Strange]] to join the [[Illuminati]], a group of powerful individuals that would make the difficult decisions no one else could.{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ====[[Infinity War/Earth-838|Infinity War]]==== [[File:Illuminati on Titan.png|{{AltFloat}}|Professor X and the [[Illuminati]] on [[Titan]]]] {{Quote|While the rest of [[Illuminati|us]] banded together to try to stop [[Thanos/Earth-838|Thanos]], [[Supreme Strange|Stephen]], as always, chose to go it alone.|Professor X to [[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} In [[2010s/Earth-838#2018|2018]], Professor X and the [[Illuminati]] banded together to stop the ferocious crusade of the genocidal [[Thanos/Earth-838|Thanos]]. Seeing no other way to defeat Thanos, [[Supreme Strange|Doctor Stephen Strange]], also known as Supreme Strange, turned to the [[Darkhold]], against the better judgement of Professor X and the rest of the team. Thanos was ultimately defeated and slain on the planet [[Titan]], with Professor X present alongside the rest of the Illuminati. [[File:Professor Charles Xavier.png|{{AltFloat}}|Professor X watches [[Supreme Strange|Doctor Strange]]'s death]] However, Strange's actions had caused an [[Incursion]], eradicating two whole universes entirely. Realizing the atrocities he had committed, Strange had surrendered himself to death, and knelt before Professor X and the rest of the team. Professor X told him he would miss him dearly, before [[Black Bolt/Earth-838|Black Bolt]] stepped forwards and told him he was sorry. The power of his voice vaporized Strange, as Professor X shut his eyes in sorrow. Xavier and his teammates later returned to Earth, where all people expressed their gratitude for their victory against the Mad Titan. However, to prevent [[Humans|humanity]] from losing faith in their heroes, Xavier and the rest of the Illuminati claimed that Strange sacrificed himself to stop Thanos, leading the people of the Earth to remember Strange as the greatest hero of his age. Xavier and the Illuminati later offered [[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Baron Mordo]] to join the Illuminati's ranks to fill Strange's vacant place.{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ====Meeting Another Doctor Strange==== [[File:Charles Xavier (Illuminati).png|{{AltFloat}}|Professor X talks to an alternate [[Doctor Strange]]]] {{Quote|We shall see what kind of Doctor Strange you are.|Professor X to [[Doctor Strange]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} When another [[Doctor Strange]] and [[America Chavez]] arrived in [[Earth-838]] from another universe, they were captured and apprehended by [[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Baron Mordo]] for traversing the [[Multiverse]], they were brought forth to the [[Illuminati]] to have their fates decided. Strange was introduced to the Illuminati before being told the truth of what happened to [[Supreme Strange]] and the actions he had committed. Professor X's teammates explained that because of Supreme Strange causing an [[Incursion]], they believed all versions of [[Hub:Stephen Strange|Doctor Strange]] to be just as capable of evil and destruction, despite Strange's plead that it was [[Scarlet Witch]] who posed a real threat. [[File:Baron Mordo & Charles Xavier.png|{{AltFloat}}|Professor X and [[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Baron Mordo]] argue over [[Doctor Strange]]]] True to Strange's word, moments later, the [[Illuminati Headquarters]] was attacked by Earth-838's [[Scarlet Witch/Earth-838|Wanda Maximoff]], under the influence of Scarlet Witch's dreamwalking. Mordo and Xavier decided to stay behind to keep watch over Strange while the rest of the Illuminati confronted her. Strange once again plead his innocence, to which Xavier believed him, much to Mordo's surprise. He chose to have faith that this Doctor Strange was better than their universe's counterpart and offered him parting words, as well as revealed the location of the Book of Vishanti, before going to confront Wanda himself.{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ====Killed by Scarlet Witch==== [[File:Xavier.png|{{AltFloat}}|Xavier in [[Scarlet Witch/Earth-838|Wanda Maximoff]]'s mind]] {{Quote|Wanda Maximoff, your mind is being held hostage by your [[Scarlet Witch|alternate self]]!|Professor X to [[Scarlet Witch/Earth-838|Wanda Maximoff]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} Once [[Scarlet Witch]] had made quick work of the other [[Illuminati]] members, Xavier confronted her personally, ordering her to stop just as she was about to capture [[America Chavez]]. He then used his telepathic powers to enter her mind, succeeding in doing so. Within Maximoff's mind, he wandered through a blank landscape, dotted with rubble attributed to her past. Xavier soon came upon his universe's [[Scarlet Witch/Earth-838|Wanda Maximoff]], trapped under rubble. [[File:Death of Charles Xavier.png|{{AltFloat}}|Professor X is killed by [[Scarlet Witch]]]] Xavier informed his universe's Wanda about what had happened to her and attempted to pull her out in order to free her from Maximoff's control; however, a blood red mist approached them both. Xavier realized what was about to happen, but did not move despite his Maximoff being pulled into the darkness. The Scarlet Witch then burst from the mist and ripped off the upper half of Xavier's head. In the real world, Xavier felt his neck being snapped and slumped over, dead in his chair.{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ===Legacy=== ====Scarlet Witch's Surrender==== Despite his failure at stopping [[Scarlet Witch]], Xavier's death was not in vain, as his attack on Scarlet Witch stalled her enough to allow [[Christine Palmer/Earth-838|Christine Palmer]] to free [[America Chavez]] and escape with [[Doctor Strange]]. Ultimately, Xavier was proven right on his belief that just because someone stumbles and loses their way does not mean they are lost forever when Strange was able to make Scarlet Witch realize her wrongdoings and destroy the [[Darkhold]], saving the [[Multiverse]] and proving himself as a good Doctor Strange like Xavier asked him to show.{{Ref|DSitMoM}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|Grab my hand. Perhaps, if I can pull you from under the rubble, the spell will break.|Professor X to [[Scarlet Witch/Earth-838|Wanda Maximoff]]|Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness}} *'''Mutant Physiology''': Professor X was a powerful [[mutant]] possessing incredible telepathic powers. However, Xavier's abilities were no match for [[Scarlet Witch]]. **'''Telepathy''': Xavier could read the minds of others as well as speak to them telepathically. He could also show people his memories, as he showed Doctor Strange his memory of [[Supreme Strange]] being killed. **'''Mental Manipulation''': [[File:Professor Charles Xavier (Earth-838).png|thumb|250px|Xavier entering [[Scarlet Witch]]'s mind]] Xavier was able to enter [[Scarlet Witch]]’s mind in an attempt to defeat her by rescuing the [[Scarlet Witch/Earth-838|consciousness]] of his universe's Scarlet Witch from the enthrallment of her [[Dreamwalking]] counterpart. ***'''Subconscious Walking''': Xavier was able to enter the subconscious of others. This was demonstrated when Xavier entered the [[Scarlet Witch/Earth-838|Scarlet Witch]]'s subconscious in an attempt to break the Dreamwalking spell. Even though Professor X has such powers to delve into others' minds, he ultimately failed to stop the Scarlet Witch as her mental powers, with the augmentation of the Darkhold, far exceeded his and eventually Xavier's head was ripped off in the subconscious world. ===Abilities=== *'''Genius-Level Intellect''': Xavier was chosen to be a member of the Illuminati for his formidable intellect, as the council was brought together to make difficult decisions that no one else could. Given that he was in the same position of power as [[Mister Fantastic/Earth-838|Mister Fantastic]], who was proclaimed to be "the smartest man alive," this speaks to Xavier's intelligence. In addition to his mind for strategy, Xavier was very wise in not judging [[Doctor Strange]] of Earth-616 for the actions of his variants. *'''Master Tactician''': Xavier was a formidable strategist, being able to come up with a plan to defeat [[Thanos/Earth-838|Thanos]] on [[Titan]] before he could execute his plan of universal genocide. ==Equipment== *'''[[Charles Xavier's Hoverchair|Hoverchair]]''': Due to his lower body paralysis, Xavier used a hoverchair to travel around. ==Facilities== *'''[[Illuminati Headquarters]]''': Xavier often met with his fellow [[Illuminati]] members at their headquarters in [[New York City]]. At one point, [[Doctor Strange]] was brought to the Headquarters, where he would be met with hostility due to the Illuminati's original [[Supreme Strange]] turning against them in the past. Xavier, however, showed faith in Strange and pondered what kind of Doctor Strange he would turn out to be. Xavier would also meet his end at the headquarters after facing the [[Scarlet Witch]], who prevailed over him during a psychic battle. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Illuminati]] - Teammates **[[Supreme Strange|Stephen Strange/Doctor Strange/Supreme Strange]] † - Friend **[[Mister Fantastic/Earth-838|Reed Richards/Mister Fantastic]] † **[[Maria Rambeau/Earth-838|Maria Rambeau/Captain Marvel]] † **[[Captain Carter/Earth-838|Peggy Carter/Captain Carter]] † **[[Black Bolt/Earth-838|Blackagar Boltagon/Black Bolt]] † **[[Baron Mordo/Earth-838|Karl Mordo/Baron Mordo]] *[[Baxter Foundation]] **[[Christine Palmer/Earth-838|Christine Palmer]] *[[Ultron Sentries]] *[[Fantastic Four/Earth-838|Fantastic Four]] *[[Inhuman Royal Family/Earth-838|Inhuman Royal Family]] *[[Doctor Strange|Stephen Strange/Doctor Strange]] *[[America Chavez]] *[[Scarlet Witch/Earth-838|Wanda Maximoff]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Thanos/Earth-838|Thanos]] † - Victim *[[Scarlet Witch|Wanda Maximoff/Scarlet Witch]] † - Killer {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *Professor X's line ''"Just because someone stumbles and loses their way doesn’t mean they are lost forever"'' was based on an identical line from the version of {{WPS|Charles Xavier (film character)|Professor X}} depicted in ''{{WPS|X-Men: Days of Future Past}}''. *''[[Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness]]'' marks the third time the character has been depicted dying in live-action, with the previous two times being in ''{{WPS|X-Men: The Last Stand}}'' and ''{{WPS|Logan (film)|Logan}}''. *An orchestrated rendition of the ''{{WPS|X-Men: The Animated Series}}''' theme song by [[Ron Wasserman]] plays when Professor X is introduced in ''[[Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness]]''. Likewise, Professor X's portrayal was heavily inspired by the 90's cartoon series, with this Variant of Professor X wearing a similar outfit, moving about in a similar yellow [[Charles Xavier's Wheelchair|hoverchair]], and having his telepathy portrayed as sonar waves.{{Ref|TAoDSitMoM}} ==Behind the Scenes== *Professor X in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] is the third live-action incarnation of the character, following an incarnation portrayed by [[Patrick Stewart]] and {{WPS|James McAvoy}}, and an incarnation portrayed by {{WPS|Harry Lloyd}}. *[[Patrick Stewart]] had previously stated in 2020 that while he had been having conversations in 2019 with [[Kevin Feige]] about reprising his role as Professor X, he had no in interest in returning to the role after ''{{WPS|Logan (film)|Logan}}''.[https://www.digitalspy.com/movies/a30526782/x-men-marvel-mcu-professor-x-patrick-stewart/ X-Men's Patrick Stewart reveals whether he'd play Professor X in the MCU] Stewart would later state in 2023 that [[Marvel Studios]] had approached him to potentially make an appearance in ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' if needed by them.[https://comicbook.com/movies/news/patrick-stewart-marvel-mcu-rumor-deadpool-3-return-exclusive/ Patrick Stewart Has Been Told to "Standby" With Hugh Jackman's Deadpool 3 Return (Exclusive)] However, after that film's release, director [[Shawn Levy]] revealed that Patrick Stewart reprising his role as Professor X was "never considered".[https://www.ign.com/articles/deadpool-wolverine-director-patrick-stewart-professor-x-cameo-never-considered Deadpool & Wolverine Director Says a Patrick Stewart Professor X Cameo Was Never Considered] *[[Gordon Tarpley]] was a stand-in and a photo double for [[Patrick Stewart]] in the role of Professor X. ==References== {{Gallery|Professor X/Earth-838/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Professor X}} *{{WP|Professor X}} [[ru:Профессор Икс]] [[es:Charles Xavier/Illuminati]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness Characters]] [[Category:Mutants]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Bald Hair]] [[Category:White Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Professors]] [[Category:Illuminati Members]]
